title: nftables 1.1.4 compatbility
body:
### Issue Description

Trying to start a privileged container with nftables 1.1.4 installed failes, yielding this error:

```
Error: unable to start container "26174d8479f6458f507e1ded21673d5f2dd168f754a771b8543d20c9ee0431ab": netavark: nftables error: got invalid json: data did not match any variant of untagged enum NfObject at line 1 column 3666
```

Downgrading to nftables 1.1.3 solves the issue.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. start a container with bridged ports
2. receive error

```
# podman-compose up -d --remove-orphans --force-recreate --build
Trying to pull docker.gitea.com/gitea:1.24.4...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2a134c4f23ef skipped: already exists
Copying blob 57122ea281e3 skipped: already exists
Copying blob a4a492c751a4 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 6afd914700c1 skipped: already exists
Copying blob f919607dbbf1 skipped: already exists
Copying blob ef8f822dc8a5 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 9824c27679d3 skipped: already exists
Copying config c44db74bae done   |
Writing manifest to image destination
c44db74baed70ced32e46227f7b43d40b20dfaa22f17a164b801790132ecfe3f
gitea
ERRO[0000] Failed to delete btrfs qgroup 354 for /var/lib/containers/storage/btrfs/subvolumes/6981c3da270c01ab06d1fe8dd1850b60b2d48887d782138cd9728334cd1d064a: device or resource busy
gitea
bcb47facb0671c37b4ef56d76d90879c46b99278e1b7ebc1bb3235b9c4059d6c
0e18b56c7c39c5c432ceb1c5cf1c228ccedb4f5c78e52ec75388268f37933ea5
26174d8479f6458f507e1ded21673d5f2dd168f754a771b8543d20c9ee0431ab
Error: unable to start container "26174d8479f6458f507e1ded21673d5f2dd168f754a771b8543d20c9ee0431ab": netavark: nftables error: got invalid json: data did not match any variant of untagged enum NfObject at line 1 column 3666
```

### Describe the results you received

No running containers

### Describe the results you expected

Running containers and accessible ports

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

This is running on [CRUX 3.8](https://crux.nu) without systemd.

### Additional information

_No response_
